arguments.argument: The core obligation of an educational tutor—especially one offered through an online platform—is to uphold justice, equality, freedom, and respect for all learners.

arguments.justification_for_response: You argue that premium resources can be leveraged to uplift the most disadvantaged and that this aligns with justice and respect. Yet, that argument rests on an optimistic assumption that access to advanced tools will automatically translate into equitable outcomes—an assumption that history shows is fragile at best.
